sglang.title: Add SWA support for runtime busy memory check
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add self_check_during_busy support for hybrid SWA models with separate full and SWA KV cache pools
Previously self_check_during_busy called tree_cache.protected_size() which raises NotImplementedError on SWARadixCache
Skip busy check when streaming sessions are enabled (not yet supported)

sglang.title: Fix swa input length limitation
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For SWA models, the SWA pool may be much smaller than the full pool. Previously, requests with input length between the SWA and full pool sizes were rejected. However, SWA cache can be evicted after chunked prefill, so larger input lengths should be accepted. This PR fixes the budget to a

sglang.title: [Test] Fix flaky test_function_call_specific by adding strict=True
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add strict=True to the get_weather tool in test_function_call_specific, matching the fix in #22586 for test_function_call_required
Without strict=True, tool_choice with a specific function only guarantees a tool call is made but arguments are best-effort (no constrained decoding on paramete

sglang.title: Fix streaming session busy check double-counting; add compat CI tests
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix double-counting in busy-time memory check for streaming sessions by adding is_active borrow tracker on SessionSlot
When restore_to_req borrows KV from a slot, the slot's req_pool_idx is intentionally not cleared (for chunked prefill retry idempotency). This caused session_held_tokens()

sglang.title: VLM: support passing  --mm-process-config for all models
sglang.author: edwingao28
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #14672.
The --mm-process-config CLI flag is parsed and stored in ServerArgs.mm_process_config, but never passed to the HuggingFace processor's call() for any model except Qwen VL (which had its own manual extraction). This means users setting e.g. --mm-process-config '{"image":{"max

sglang.title: [server] Add --quantization unquant to explicitly opt out of quantization
sglang.author: klshuster
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Models like DeepSeek V3/R1 auto-detect FP8 quantization when --quantization is not explicitly set. There is currently no way to explicitly opt out of quantization for these models — passing --quantization None is not valid, and omitting the flag triggers auto-detection.
This PR adds --qua

sglang.title: [DSA] Hopper FP8 FlashMLA KV padding
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Adds q-head padding for flashmla_kv to support pure-TP configurations. FlashMLA requires q heads to be 64 or 128, but with tensor parallelism the per-GPU head count gets divided (e.g., GLM-5's 64 heads / TP8 = 8 heads; DeepSeek V3.2's 128 heads / TP8 = 16 heads). When using TP+DP attention,

sglang.title: [RL] Fix weight update for mxfp8 flashinfer_cutlass gemm backend
sglang.author: zianglih

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
sglang generate \

  --width 1536 --height 1024 \
  --prompt "A beautiful sunset over the ocean" \
  --pipeline-class-name LTX2TwoStagePipeline \
  --save-output

sglang.title: Enable modelopt quantized FLUX deployment
sglang.author: Edwardf0t1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add support for deploying NVIDIA ModelOpt FP8-quantized diffusion models in SGLang, starting with FLUX. This enables running FP8 checkpoints produced by ModelOpt's post-training quantization (quant_algo: "FP8", quant_method: "modelopt") directly through the existing sglang generate / sgla

sglang.title: [CI/Docker] Clean up redundant flashinfer cubin downloads
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Follow-up to #22322.
Cleans up redundant flashinfer cubin download steps across the CI workflows and the main Dockerfile that were missed in the previous PR.
cc @Kangyan-Zhou

sglang.title: Fix broken streaming response with --incremental-streaming-output
sglang.author: kpham-sgl
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #22510
--incremental-streaming-output + stream=True produces garbled text for all models (not just Gemma 4).
Root cause: #21037 (c37200f) changed tokenizer_manager.py to emit incremental deltas (state.text[last_text_offset:]) instead of cumulative text (state.text) when incremental_

sglang.title: [lora] Fix partial MoE rank loading, VL lm_head, strict loading, deepseek on-demand
sglang.author: klshuster
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Several LoRA loading bugs affect correctness and usability:

Partial MoE rank loading — when a LoRA adapter has fewer ranks than max_lora_rank, the A-buffer stacked components are placed at wrong offsets, causing the MoE kernel's [:max_r] / [max_r:2*max_r] slicing to read garbage.
VL mode

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Add FLUX.1-dev ModelOpt NVFP4 support
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

add a FLUX.1-dev ModelOpt NVFP4 mixed-transformer builder for SGLang diffusion
make NVFP4 loading configurable for nibble swapping and preserve validated FLUX.1-dev export layout
fix FLUX attention/single-block quant prefixes so FLUX.1 fallback excludes match the intended modules
add unit c

sglang.title: diffusion: fix layerwise offload for ModelOpt quantized DiTs
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

preserve non-contiguous tensor strides in LayerwiseOffloadManager so ModelOpt FP8 weights keep the runtime layout expected by the FP8 GEMM path
align contiguous layerwise-offload buffer slices to 32-byte boundaries so alignment-sensitive diffusion kernels still work after restore
keep dit_l

sglang.title: fix: streaming session race condition + some metrics
sglang.author: ishandhanani
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Stabilize streaming session KV lifecycle: fix multiple memory leaks, add safety for session close during active decoding, and add Prometheus metrics.
Race conditions & lifecycle

Fix open_session waiter race: register the future before sending OpenSessionReqInput, clean up defensively, and t

sglang.title: fix(PD): respect pause_generation in disagg event loops
sglang.author: lawrence-harmonic
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix #20906
Modifications

Add self._engine_paused check
Ensure processing of PD queues (bootstrap and transfer) still completes
Add regression test

sglang.title: Extract pause_resume_in_place kit; rename test_abort to test_scheduler_control
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Extract test_pause_resume_in_place from test_disaggregation_basic.py into reusable PauseResumeInPlaceMixin kit (python/sglang/test/kits/pause_generation_kit.py)
Add the kit to non-disagg TestSchedulerControl (formerly TestAbortAll) for single-server pause/resume coverage
Rename test_abort.p

sglang.title: [CPU] Fix argument issues in qkv_proj_with_rope_fused_weight and bmm…
sglang.author: blzheng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
…_cpu

Motivation

This PR fixes the following issue encountered when running DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus: w_scale is only required for FP8 in the kernels qkv_proj_with_rope_fused_weight and bmm_cpu, so we updated the frontend logic to pass w_scale=None for other data types.
command: python -m sglang.lau

sglang.title: [RL] Refactor NVFP4 shuffling/swizzling to in-place replacement
sglang.author: zianglih
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
@HumansAnd
#18085 is an earlier fix for nvfp4 weight update but it did not fix trtllm backend, since trtllm backend used *_weights_fp4_shuffled tensors, which requires broader refactoring for in-pace replacement.
This PR replaces all *_weights_fp4_shuffled with the original weight tensor

sglang.author: hzh0425

Motivation
Collabrate with  @ispobock @yizhang2077 @pansicheng  @xiezhq-hermann
MambaRadixCache and SWARadixCache maintain separate cache management logic with significant code duplication. Worse, each new attention variant (full, sliding-window, SSM, or future combinations) would require yet anothe

sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Remove redundant tests in test_chunked_prefill.py to reduce CI time:

test_chunked_prefill — default path (radix_cache=True, mixed_chunk=False), implicitly covered by all other MMLU integration tests
test_chunked_prefill_without_radix_cache — disable_radix_cache path is already covered by te

sglang.title: [codex] Add LTX-2.3 benchmark skill recipes
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Made with codex
What changed
This PR updates the diffusion benchmark-related skills so LTX-2.3 is documented with both of its supported benchmark paths alongside the existing LTX-2 coverage.
The changes include:

splitting the LTX-2.3 benchmark preset into ltx23-one-stage and ltx23-two-stage in benc

sglang.title: Add bfloat16 KV cache validation for HiSparse
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add validation to fail fast when HiSparse is enabled with non-bfloat16 KV cache, as e.g., NVFP4 models default to FP8
cc @xiezhq-hermann @hzh0425 @huangtingwei9988

sglang.title: Upgrade CI default CUDA version from 12.9 to 13.0
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Upgrade CI default CUDA from 12.9 to 13.0 to match Torch 2.11's default
All CI runners already have driver 580+ (CUDA 13.0 capable)
B200 Novita upgraded to driver 590 (CUDA 13.1)

Changes

ci_install_dependency.sh: CU_VERSION cu129 → cu130
docker/Dockerfile: default CUDA_VERSION 12.9.1 → 13

vllm.title: [HMA] [KVEvent] Enable GPU-side KV events for HMA
vllm.author: hickeyma
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Evicted group information is important for routing Hybrid Model Architecture (HMA) aware prefix-cache in distributed serving frameworks as vLLM can evict Sliding Window Attention (SWA) blocks while retaining the full-attention blocks. Without this information it would assume complete evictio

vllm.title: [Pooling] Disable async scheduling by default for pooling models
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Asynchronous scheduling mostly benefits decode performance and as currently implemented can have a negative impact on TTFT. This means overall performance of pooling models is better without it enabled, so we'll disable it by default for now for these.

vllm.title: [Core][Metrics] Remove `vllm:prompt_tokens_recomputed` metric
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In the case of a full local prefix cache hit (prompt length N), we actually only use N-1 tokens. The vllm:prompt_tokens_recomputed was intended to count how many cached tokens we are effectively discarding because of this.
KVCacheManager.get_computed_blocks():
    ...
    # NOTE: When all tokens hit

vllm.title: [KVConnector][NIXL] Organize NIXL connector into its own directory
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Over the past year the number of features supported by the connector has grown almost as much as the lines of code that the nixl_connector.py file accumulated.
This PR creates a separate directory for it and isolates connector/scheduler code in the hope of improving clarity and maintainability.
Will

vllm.title: fix(moe): fix RoutedExpertsCapturer assertion failure with DP>1 and MK path
vllm.author: Young-Leo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This PR fixes an AssertionError in RoutedExpertsCapturer.capture() that occurs during CUDA graph capture when --data-parallel-size > 1 and the quantization method uses the Modular Kernel (MK) path (supports_internal_mk=True).
Root Cause:
In DefaultMoERunner.forward(), there are two DP di

vllm.title: [compile] Bug fix for _decompose_size_nodes
vllm.author: anijain2305
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Bug: _decompose_size_nodes treated all users of size() the same — it spliced the per-dim values into the user's args via extend(dims). For view(clone, size) this is correct: it becomes view(clone, d0, d1, ...).  But for getitem(size, 1), the splice produces getitem(sym_size_int, 5120, 1) — 3 args in

vllm.title: [compile] Enable AOT compile with batch invariance mode.
vllm.author: zhxchen17
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Previously we disable AOT compile when batch invariance mode was enabled.
However, this is never verified to be necessary always. As batch invariance
feature improves, we should be able to compose it with AOT compile without issue.
So we just remove this override from the envs.py and verify

vllm.title: fused qknorm+rope kernel optimization for SM9.0
vllm.author: EricccYang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The qknorm+rope fused kernel performs worse than the unfused Triton kernel on H100.
The main reason is that the 1-head per warp pattern does not perform well with large token batches.
This PR improves the qknorm+rope kernel by dynamically adjusting the workload per warp
based on the number o

vllm.title: fix(lmcache): correct store for cached requests and num_scheduled_tokens in lmcache_mp_connector.py
vllm.author: maobaolong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix two bugs in lmcache_mp_connector.py related to incorrect KV store behavior for cached requests:

Fix num_scheduled_tokens source for cached requests: In _process_cached_requests, the num_new_tokens was incorrectly using cached_reqs.num_computed_tokens[idx] instead of scheduler_output.num

vllm.title: feat: rename logit_bias/logit_scale to logit_mean/logit_sigma for affine score calibration
vllm.author: jefp
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Rename the affine score calibration parameters in PoolerConfig to align with LayerNorm convention, as suggested by @noooop in #39435:

logit_bias → logit_mean (same behavior: subtract from logits)
logit_scale → logit_sigma (divide instead of multiply)

Formula: activation((logit - logit_mean

vllm.title: [XPU]Enhance environment collection for Intel XPU and optimize layout
vllm.author: 1643661061leo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Summary
This PR improves collect_env.py by expanding Intel XPU metrics, distinguishing between build/runtime environments, and optimizing the visual layout for both CUDA and XPU platforms.
Key Changes

Expanded XPU Metrics: Added collection for IGC, oneAPI, Level Zero, SYCL, and vLLM XPU ker

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix GLM tool parser streaming with MTP or stream interval
vllm.author: sfeng33
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix #34449

Rewrites Glm4MoeModelToolParser.extract_tool_calls_streaming() from a buffer-based state machine to a stateless "re-parse and diff" approach
Fixes malformed/lost tool call arguments when stream_interval > 1 or MTP speculative decoding is enabled

Test Plan
Unit test
pytest tests/
